build-your-own-form.title: Build your own form
build-your-own-form.subheader: Access the build your own form guidance link

address.header: What is your address in the UK?
address.intro: If you have no fixed address, enter an address where we can contact you.

address-lookup.cantfind: I can't find the address in the list

postcode-api.not-found: Sorry - we couldn't find any addresses for that postcode, enter your address manually
postcode-api.cant-connect: Sorry - we couldn't connect to the postcode lookup service at this time, enter your address manually

confirm.header: Check your answers before submitting your application.

confirmation.title: Application sent
confirmation.content: We’ll contact you with the decision of your application or if we need more information from you.

exit.message: We have cleared your information to keep it secure. Your information has not been saved.

session-timeout-warning.dialog-title: {% if showSaveAndExit %}You will be signed out soon{% endif %}{% if not showSaveAndExit %}Your application will close soon{% endif %}
session-timeout-warning.dialog-text: {% if showSaveAndExit %}Any answers you have saved will not be affected, but your progress on this page will not be saved.{% endif %}{% if not showSaveAndExit %}If that happens, your progress will not be saved.{% endif %}
session-timeout-warning.timeout-continue-button: {% if showSaveAndExit %}Stay signed in{% endif %}{% if not showSaveAndExit %}Stay on this page{% endif %}
session-timeout-warning.dialog-exit-link: {% if showSaveAndExit %}Sign out{% endif %}{% if not showSaveAndExit %}Exit this form{% endif %}

save-and-exit.paragraph-1: Your form doesn't appear to have been worked on for 30 minutes so we closed it for security.
save-and-exit.paragraph-2: Any answers you saved have not been affected.
save-and-exit.paragraph-3: You can sign back in to your application at any time by returning to the start page.
